title: NowYouCanFishAgain-Pixelmon
description: A simple Pixelmon sidemod for versions 9.2.x that aims to make fishing possible by playing a sound effect and sending a chat message until a fix has been implemented for the missing lines/bobbers bug present in some of these versions.
body:
A simple Pixelmon sidemod for versions 9.2.x that aims to make fishing possible by playing a sound effect and sending a message in chat until a fix has been implemented for the missing lines/bobbers bug present in some of these versions.

This mod can be installed on the client, server, or both. For dual installs, the server's message will play.

Note: This is not a fix, but is intended as a workaround so players will still be able to fish until the bug is patched.
